title: Sing Another Chorus
writer: Marion Orth, Paul Gerard Smith, Brenda Weisberg
actors: Johnny Downs, Jane Frazee, Mischa Auer
plot: Arthur Peyton, sole owner of Peyton Frocks, Inc., is wrestling with a multitude of problems: slow sales, slower collections and a son, Andy, who wants to write stage revues. Andy is being urged on by Francine La Verne, an ex-burle...
